## Screenshots

For UI-visible changes. Before / after helps.

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Manually clicked through the affected flow in the browser (demo mode or real Meta session)
- [ ] Updated the matching help article under `docs/**` (and added a line to `docs/README.md` if the article is new)

Describe what you clicked through and what you verified.

## Notes for reviewers

Anything non-obvious, tradeoffs considered, or follow-up work left for another PR.
